scale: Each dimension is scored 0–3: 0 = large gap vs market leaders, 1 = basic/partial, 2 = competitive for a segment, 3 = best-in-class or leading.

dimensions.label: Process depth
dimensions.description: ITIL/process coverage, templates, edge cases, practitioner workflows

dimensions.label: Admin & no-code config
dimensions.description: Fields, policies, UI builder, safe citizen admin without engineering

dimensions.label: Integrations & ecosystem
dimensions.description: Connectors, iPaaS patterns, webhooks, vendor app marketplace depth

dimensions.label: Analytics & reporting
dimensions.description: Operational and executive analytics, dashboards, exports, cross-module insights

dimensions.label: Compliance & audit
dimensions.description: Statutory/regulatory packs, audit trails, retention, certifications narrative

dimensions.label: AI & advanced automation
dimensions.description: Classification, search assist, grounded answers, multi-model, governance

dimensions.label: Mobile & offline
dimensions.description: Native apps, field/offline, push, parity with web for key flows

dimensions.label: TCO & implementation
dimensions.description: Time-to-value, hosting options, predictable ops cost vs $100–200/seat incumbents
